title: Trigram drill: the, ing, and, ion
text: the the the ing ing ing and and and ion ion ion the king is running the action and the meeting and the morning and the singing and the action

tips.text: These four three-letter runs turn up more than any others. Learn them as units and you write less, type more.
Each one should land like a single rolling move, not three deliberate taps.

tips.target: the the the ing ing ing and and and ion ion ion the king is

tips.text: Try this: run 'ing' ten times over. If it flows without a stutter, the cluster has become one motion.

tips.target: running the action and the meeting and the morning and the singing and the action

character_tips.anna: Three-letter chunks are the next step up. Work them in until they cost no thought. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.maxim: These show up in every paragraph you will ever set. Small daily practice compounds. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.knopych: Three keys, one move. Let it roll off the hand. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.klavochka: Three letters in one easy sweep, no break between. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
